title: Security audit page reads cleanly on mobile
description: Tabs in the redacted report wrap into a 2×2 grid instead of a horizontal scroll, the severity summary renders as per-priority cards on phones (and stays a table on desktop), and the bug-pattern cards stack their labels above the body so prose gets the full card width.

title: Added Vorbiz to the live tools list
description: Vorbiz — a free POS tracker for booth and market vendors, native iOS + Android, offline-first across multiple devices — is now listed alongside the other live tools on /tools.
